11.reason: This condition is too restrictive; it prevents processing hyphens at position len-2 (second last). Should be i>0 && i<len-1 to properly include all hyphens with both neighbors.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  This condition is too restrictive; it prevents processing hyphens at position len-2 (second last). Should be i>0 && i<len-1 to properly include all hyphens with both neighbors.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Condition should be i>0 && i<len-1 to allow hyphen at the last possible position (e.g., index len-2)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The condition `i < len - 2` is incorrect. It prevents processing a hyphen at the second-to-last position (e.g., in "a-b", index of '-' is 1, len is 3, 1 < 3-2 is false). It should be `i > 0 && i < len - 1` to ensure there are characters on both sides.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The condition `i < len - 2` is incorrect. It prevents processing a hyphen at the second-to-last position (e.g., "a-b" where '-' is at index 1 and len is 3, so 1 < 3-2 is false). It should be `i > 0 && i < len - 1` to ensure there are characters on both sides.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition `i < len - 2` is incorrect. It should be `i > 0 && i < len - 1` to ensure both `data[i-1]` and `data[i+1]` are valid. The current condition skips the last possible '-' at position `len-2` and also allows access to `data[i-1]` when `i=0`, causing undefined behavior. Additionally, it fails to handle cases where '-' is at the second last position correctly.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition `i < len - 2` is incorrect. It should be `i > 0 && i < len - 1` to ensure both `data[i-1]` and `data[i+1]` are valid. The current condition skips processing '-' at position `len-2`, which is the last valid position for a '-' that has a following character. Also, it doesn't check that `i > 0`, leading to potential out-of-bounds access when i=0.]
